verdict.where_lag_is_not: Cannot attribute completion shortfall to writer tuning from this artifact set — persist-on benchmark never produced a valid 240s on run or SUSTAIN_SUMMARY.
verdict.where_lag_is_now: Primary signal is load-generator / HTTP stability during persist-on: httpx ReadError and job failure before sustained window.
verdict.next_measurement: Re-run persist-on job until succeeded=1, write on_end.txt, then run scripts/v3_p12_9_iter3_rerun_hygiene.py to get official completion_ratio_percent_on_over_off
